---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ilihack
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to achieve this? Why is your approach better?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations are welcome.
